title: Comment from AllianceChicago, HHS-ONC-2025-0005, HHS-ONC-2025-0005-0001, 2025-23896
comment_text: The AllianceChicago is pleased to offer comments on 45 CFR Parts 170 and 171, “Health Data, Technology, and Interoperability: ASTP/ONC Deregulatory Actions To Unleash Prosperity” (HTI-5) Proposed Rule.
